title: Add situation grip and snapshot digest
goal: Implement a read-only Grabowski situation surface that summarizes repo, PR, Bureau, job, gate and stale snapshot state and recommends the next safe grip without mutation.

acceptance.assertion: The new situation path is read-only and does not refresh connectors, mutate repositories, dispatch work or complete Bureau tasks.
Output includes repository/branch/head/dirty state, open PR/check/review summary when available, Bureau task/run/blocker state when available, and visible non-claims when unavailable.
Output includes a capability or tool-contract digest plus runtime/source identity sufficient to warn about stale tool pictures.
Output recommends at most one next safe grip with reason, preconditions and explicit does-not-establish language.
Focused tests cover normal state, missing optional sources, stale digest warning and no-mutation behavior.

metadata.non_goal: Does not replace Bureau task truth or force a connector refresh.
metadata.verification_note: Grabowski PR #88 merged; local and CI validation passed before merge.
